title: Accessibility feedback form - Canada.ca
content:
## Accessibility feedback form
This is your opportunity to provide feedback on barriers you have experienced or noticed, or any matter related to accessibility. You can also provide feedback on IRCC’s accessibility plan.
You can consult the Accessibility feedback process for other ways to provide feedback and to learn how we use your feedback.
Feedback can be submitted anonymously or with personal information identified. All feedback related to accessibility will be captured in a central location for analysis and record keeping.
The collection of personal information is authorized by section 7(1)(a) and Section 70 of the Accessible Canada Act . This personal information is collected by the Administration, Security and Accommodation branch to comply with the Accessible Canada Act by creating a mechanism to collect feedback and be able to respond back to the individual and acknowledge that their feedback has been collected and how it was handled.
Collection and use of this personal information is in accordance with the Privacy Act . The mechanism is used to collect feedback internally and externally on our Accessibility Plan, future progress reports, as well as accessibility and barriers to accessibility within the work carried out in each department.
The personal information collected is described in Personal Information Bank PSU 938 – Outreach Activities and will be retained for 7 years. Under the Privacy Act you have the right of access to, and correction of, your personal information. To exercise either of these rights, contact IRCC’s ATIP Coordinator. If you are not satisfied with our response to your privacy concern, you may wish to Contact the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada.
- Tracy Perry A/Access to Information and Privacy Coordinator Narono Building 360 Laurier Avenue West, 10th Floor Ottawa, Ontario K1A 1L1 Telephone: 1-800-667-6703 Facsimile: 613-957-6517 ATIP-AIPRP@cic.gc.ca
- Contact the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada
- Accessible Canada Act section 7(1)(a) Section 70
- Personal Information Bank PSU 938 – Outreach Activities
